prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog body illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor.

Scene: Avilia assembles a simple blog framework with blocks labeled "Hexo", "Fluid", "评论", "阅读量", "分类". The layout is tidy and readable, emphasizing a clean reading-first blog.

Core meaning: the new blog basic functions were built and tuned for reading.

Style: clean technical blog illustration, black/red/white, small blue UI lines, lots of white space. Minimal labels: "基础功能", "阅读优先".

Avoid dense architecture, avoid theme logo copying.
